title: Real gundams, top 3D generator, open-source world models, ChatGPT updates, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search published a YouTube news episode covering recent AI developments including Pixal3D for 3D generation, Sana-WM for world models, MiniCPM for multimodal tasks, Krea2 for creative tools, and updates to ChatGPT including finance features and Codex mobile access. The episode highlights numerous open-source and proprietary tools across video, 3D, music, and robotics domains.
